rule.name: React Debug/Verbose Mode Enabled
rule.rule_desc: Detects development/debug settings in potentially deployable paths.
rule.vuln_desc: Debug verbosity can leak internals and sensitive information.
rule.reviewer: Verify runtime profile separation and safe logging levels. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: React Injection Sink (Eval/Function)
rule.rule_desc: Detects dynamic code execution sinks in application flows.
rule.vuln_desc: Dynamic execution with untrusted input can lead to code injection/RCE.
rule.developer: Avoid dynamic execution; enforce strict input handling.
rule.reviewer: Trace user-controllable data into eval/function constructors. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: React SQL/NoSQL Injection Sink
rule.rule_desc: Detects query construction patterns requiring injection review.
rule.vuln_desc: String-based or unsafe query construction may enable injection attacks.
rule.developer: Use parameterized queries and ORM-safe APIs.
rule.reviewer: Review tainted inputs in DB query call paths. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: React Permissive CORS
rule.rule_desc: Detects wildcard CORS policies in framework/server config.
rule.vuln_desc: Wildcard CORS can expose APIs to arbitrary origins.
rule.developer: Restrict allowed origins and methods explicitly.
rule.reviewer: Validate CORS config in bootstrap and middleware setup. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: React Hardcoded Secret Material
rule.rule_desc: Detects likely hardcoded credentials or tokens.
rule.vuln_desc: Hardcoded secrets are vulnerable to repository and artifact exposure.
rule.developer: Externalize and rotate secrets using managed secret stores.
rule.reviewer: Confirm literals are not production secrets. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.
